backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for SwipeTrack Pro that manages attendance records and user profiles with role-based access control, supporting CRUD operations for records filtered by date range and principal.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented PWA features (manifest, service worker, Apple meta tags) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and key changes in each component, page, and utility.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: PWA-ready HTML entry point for SwipeTrack Pro including manifest link, theme-color meta, Apple mobile web app meta tags, and Apple touch icon links for 180×180, 152×152, and 120×120 sizes.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA Web App Manifest for SwipeTrack Pro declaring standalone display, dark charcoal theme/background colors, and a full icon set from 48×48 to 512×512 with maskable variants for Play Store compatibility.
frontend/public/sw.js: Minimal service worker implementing cache-first for static assets, network-first for navigation, and passthrough for ICP/canister API calls, with app shell caching on install and immediate activation.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with five routes (Today, Dashboard, Leaves, Analytics, Export), wraps the app in AuthGuard, renders the ProfileSetup modal, and initializes notification reminders.
frontend/src/components/AppleCalendarOve: A modal calendar overlay component with Apple-style animations, swipe-to-dismiss, and month navigation for selecting a date.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Wraps children with authentication protection, showing a loading spinner during initialization or redirecting to LoginScreen if unauthenticated.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app shell with a sticky header (logo, theme toggle, user dropdown), bottom navigation bar, and offline sync status indicator.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Landing/login page displaying app branding, feature highlights, and an Internet Identity sign-in button.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name on first login, saving the profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/SmartSwipeOutPre: Displays a predicted swipe-out time or a 'target met' message based on remaining weekly work hours needed.
frontend/src/components/SyncStatusIndica: Small status badge that renders different icons and labels for synced, syncing, offline, and pending sync states.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: Icon button that toggles between light and dark themes using the useTheme hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated (or anonymous) backend actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotificationRemind: Schedules daily browser notifications on weekdays reminding users to swipe in at 10:00 and swipe out at 18:30, rescheduling automatically each day.
frontend/src/hooks/useOfflineSync.ts: Manages an offline queue of attendance records in localStorage and syncs them to the backend actor when connectivity is restored, exposing sync status and pending count.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on attendance records and user profiles, wrapping the backend actor calls with caching and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Manages light/dark theme state, persisting the preference to localStorage and applying the appropriate CSS class to the document root immediately to prevent flash.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color tokens including status, chart, and sidebar colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Analytics.tsx: Analytics page that fetches attendance records for the current week and month, then renders bar charts for daily and weekly hours alongside computed stats like average and highest daily hours.
frontend/src/pages/DailyEntry.tsx: React page for logging a single day's attendance, including swipe-in/out times, breakfast toggle, and leave type selection, with offline sync support and a smart swipe-out prediction component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: React dashboard page that displays weekly and monthly attendance statistics, progress toward weekly hour targets, and a day-by-day breakdown using records fetched via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/Export.tsx: React page that allows users to export attendance records for a selected date range (week, month, or all) as CSV or TSV/Excel files.
frontend/src/pages/Leaves.tsx: React page that displays a summary and chronological history of full-day and half-day leaves derived from all attendance records.
frontend/src/utils/hoursCalculation.ts: Pure utility module containing constants and functions for calculating daily and weekly working hours, applying leave deductions, parsing/formatting times, and checking core-hours violations.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those parameters via sessionStorage and the browser history API.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom color tokens (using oklch CSS variables), typography, container queries, animation plugins, and extended theme values for fonts, border radii, shadows, and sidebar/chart colors.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the SwipeTrack Pro attendance tracker app's architecture, feature list, known issues, and image asset requirements at schema version 1.0.0 / state version 21.
